title: MatchChatImagesStoragePath
description: Chat images uploaded inside a match conversation. Stored at matches/{matchId}/images/{fileName}. Read requires match participation; create and owner cleanup require an active match.
x-storage-write: create by active match participant with uploaderUid metadata; delete by that uploader; updates denied

x-storage-custom-metadata.uploaderUid: required Firebase Auth uid; immutable object owner

uploaderUid.description: Required custom Storage metadata; must match request.auth.uid when the object is created or deleted.
